name: household-finance-system
description: Building a platform that helps families understand, control, and optimize their shared cash flow through transparent expense tracking, budget monitoring, and easy-to-understand insights.

scripts.test: pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter worker test
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter web lint && pnpm --filter worker lint
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm --filter web lint --fix && pnpm --filter worker lint --fix
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter worker typecheck
